zh.Knapdale, Argyll, Scotland: 蘇格蘭阿吉爾可納達爾
zh.Isle of Mull, Argyll, Scotland: 蘇格蘭阿吉爾易斯爾 本 姆爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Malcolm Gillie Coluim 3rd Chief of MacLean於大約1240年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾可納達爾時，他的父親Malise mac Gilleain MacLean II Chief of Clan MacLean22歲，母親Gillise Gille Iosa Maolisa22歲。他於大約1260年與Roighnach Rignach of Carrick在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他於1314年登記服兵役。他去世於大約1329年在蘇格蘭阿吉爾易斯爾 本 姆爾享年91歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾易納。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Malcolm Gillie Coluim 3rd Chief of MacLean于大约1240年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾可納達爾时，他的父亲Malise mac Gilleain MacLean II Chief of Clan MacLean22岁，母亲Gillise Gille Iosa Maolisa22岁。他于大约1260年与Roighnach Rignach of Carrick在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他于1314年登记服兵役。他去世于大约1329年在苏格兰阿吉爾易斯爾 本 姆爾享年91岁，埋葬在苏格兰阿吉爾易納。

nameMeanings.name: Gillie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Berwickshire) and Irish: variant of   Gillis  .

variants.name: Gillis
meanings: Scottish (western) and Irish (Ulster): Anglicized form of Scottish Gaelic Gille Iosa, Irish Giolla Íosa ‘servant of Jesus’, or a shortened form from Mac Gille Íosa or Mac Giolla Íosa ‘son of the servant of Jesus’. Compare McLeish . The usual spelling in Scotland is Gillies .
Flemish, Dutch, and Walloon: from the personal name Gillis, a Flemish equivalent and Walloon variant of French and Walloon Gilles .

nameMeanings.name: Coluim
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: McCallum
meanings: Scottish and Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Caluim ‘son of Calum or Colum’, a personal name derived from Latin columba ‘dove’. The surname often represents a short form of Mac Gille Caluim or Mac Giolla Coluim ‘son of the servant (i.e. devotee) of Saint Columba’ (Colum Cille). The personal name (Scottish Calum, Irish Colum, originally combined with giolla ‘servant’) has long been popular in Scotland and Ireland, due largely to the cult of Saint Columba, 521–597, who converted the Picts to Christianity and founded an influential monastery on the island of Iona. His name in Irish is Colum Cille ‘Dove of the Church’.

nameMeanings.name: Malcolm
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of the medieval Gaelic name Mael Coluim ‘devotee of St Columba’. Columba was a 6th-century monk of Irish origin who played a leading part in the conversion to Christianity of Scotland and northern England; see also Callum and Colm . He has always been one of the most popular saints in Scotland, but in the Middle Ages it was felt to be presumptuous to give the names of saints directly to children; instead their blessing was invoked by prefixing the name with mael ‘devotee of’ or gille ‘servant of’. Since the 1930s the given name has been used widely in the English-speaking world, not just by those with Scottish connections.

en.lifeSummary: When Malcolm Gillie Coluim 3rd Chief of MacLean was born about 1240, in Knapdale, Argyll, Scotland, his father, Malise mac Gilleain MacLean II Chief of Clan MacLean, was 22 and his mother, Gillise Gille Iosa Maolisa, was 22. He married Roighnach Rignach of Carrick about 1260, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He registered for military service in 1314. He died about 1329, in Isle of Mull, Argyll, Scotland, at the age of 91, and was buried in Iona, Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Malcolm Gillie Coluim 3rd Chief of MacLean est né environ 1240, à Knapdale, Argyll, Écosse, son père, Malise mac Gilleain MacLean II Chief of Clan MacLean, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Gillise Gille Iosa Maolisa, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Roighnach Rignach of Carrick environ 1260, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1314. Il est décédé environ 1329, à Isle of Mull, Argyll, Écosse, à l’âge de 91 ans, et a été enterré à Iona, Argyll, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Malcolm Gillie Coluim 3rd Chief of MacLean um 1240 in Knapdale, Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Malise mac Gilleain MacLean II Chief of Clan MacLean 22 und seine Mutter Gillise Gille Iosa Maolisa 22. Er hat um 1260 in Scotland Roighnach Rignach of Carrick geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er hat sich 1314 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb um 1329 im Alter von 91 Jahren in Isle of Mull, Argyll, Scotland und wurde in Iona, Argyll, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Malcolm Gillie Coluim 3rd Chief of MacLean è nato il circa 1240 nel Knapdale, Argyll, Scotland, il suo padre, Malise mac Gilleain MacLean II Chief of Clan MacLean, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Gillise Gille Iosa Maolisa, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Roighnach Rignach of Carrick circa 1260, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1314. Morì circa 1329, nel Isle of Mull, Argyll, Scotland, all'età di 91 anni, e fu sepolto a Iona, Argyll, Scotland.

ja.Knapdale, Argyll, Scotland: スコットランドアルグイルナプダル
ja.Isle of Mull, Argyll, Scotland: スコットランドアルグイルイスル オフ ムル
ja.Iona, Argyll, Scotland: スコットランドアルグイルアイオナ
ja.lifeSummary: Malcolm Gillie Coluim 3rd Chief of MacLeanが約1240年にスコットランドアルグイルナプダルで生まれた時，父Malise mac Gilleain MacLean II Chief of Clan MacLeanは22歳，母Gillise Gille Iosa Maolisaは22歳であった。約1260年にスコットランドでRoighnach Rignach of Carrickと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1314年に兵役登録をした。彼は約1329年にスコットランドアルグイルイスル オフ ムルで91歳で死去し，スコットランドアルグイルアイオナにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Malcolm Gillie Coluim 3rd Chief of MacLean(이)가 대략 1240년 스컷랜드 아그이 냅데일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Malise mac Gilleain MacLean II Chief of Clan MacLean(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Gillise Gille Iosa Maolisa(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1260년 스컷랜드에서 Roighnach Rignach of Carrick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1314년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 대략 1329년 스컷랜드 아그이 이슬일 프 뮐에서 91세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이 이오나에 묻혔다.

mg.about 1240–about 1329: tany ho any amin'ny 1240–tany ho any amin'ny 1329

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Malcolm Gillie Coluim 3rd Chief of MacLean nasceu aproximadamente 1240, em Knapdale, Argyll, Scotland, seu pai, Malise mac Gilleain MacLean II Chief of Clan MacLean, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Gillise Gille Iosa Maolisa, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Roighnach Rignach of Carrick aproximadamente 1260, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1314. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1329, em Isle of Mull, Argyll, Scotland, com 91 anos, e foi sepultado em Iona, Argyll, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Malcolm Gillie Coluim 3rd Chief of MacLean родился около 1240 г. в местности напдеил, аргилл, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Malise mac Gilleain MacLean II Chief of Clan MacLean было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Gillise Gille Iosa Maolisa, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Roighnach Rignach of Carrick около 1260 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. В 1314 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер около 1329 г. в местности исл оф мулл, аргилл, Шотландия в возрасте 91 год и был похоронен в местности иона, аргилл, Шотландия.

sm.about 1240–about 1329: e tusa o le 1240–e tusa o le 1329

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Malcolm Gillie Coluim 3rd Chief of MacLean nació aproximadamente 1240, en Knapdale, Argyll, Scotland, su papá, Malise mac Gilleain MacLean II Chief of Clan MacLean, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Gillise Gille Iosa Maolisa, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Roighnach Rignach of Carrick aproximadamente 1260, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1314. Murió aproximadamente 1329, en Isle of Mull, Argyll, Scotland, a la edad de 91 años, y fue sepultado en Iona, Argyll, Scotland.
